name: champion-enigma-engine
description: CEE — Biometric-visual AI framework for quantifying athlete intangibles. Four skills (cee-framework, visual-cortex-analyzer, physiological-decoder, psychological-profiler) and one evaluator agent. Grounded in 2025 research, every capability feasibility-rated so no overstated claims ship.

interface.shortDescription: Biometric-visual AI for quantifying athlete intangibles
interface.longDescription: The Champion Enigma Engine (CEE) is a research-grounded framework for quantifying the intangible traits that separate champions — emotional resilience, focus, mental toughness, neurological efficiency, clutch behavior. It has four components: (1) Visual Cortex Analyzer reads face/gaze/body-language, (2) Physiological Decoder reads stress/flow/neural-efficiency via wearables, (3) Psychological Profiler combines biometric proxies with psych-survey data, (4) Neural Quantification Engine fuses the three into performance predictions. Every capability is feasibility-rated (Feasible / Emerging / Speculative) per 2025 research. This plugin scaffolds the framework; actual ML training happens in downstream HuggingFace-based pipelines.
interface.defaultPrompt: Walk me through how the Champion Enigma Engine would evaluate a college quarterback prospect — what's feasible today, what's emerging, what's speculative.
